description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a compact rectangular footprint and a simple, utilitarian design. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic appearance, while the roof is a low-pitched shed style covered in what appears to be corrugated metal or wooden shingles. The front facade features a single door and a small window, both framed in wood, with the window positioned to the right of the door. The side and rear views reveal minimal fenestration, emphasizing the cabin's modest and functional character. The structure sits directly on a flat base, with no visible foundation or steps, and there is no porch or overhang. The overall look is that of a basic, rural shelter suitable for use in parks, backyards, or as a small outbuilding in an urban environment.
description: A compact, rustic wooden cabin with a shed roof, single door, and one small window on the front facade. The design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door and a small window to its right, both set in a plain wooden facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabin's short depth and the absence of windows or doors on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wooden wall with no openings or architectural features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabin's compact profile and lack of side fenestration.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope, likely covered in wood or metal panels
attribute_window_arrangement: One small rectangular window on the front facade, positioned to the right of the door; no windows visible on the sides or rear
attribute_door_placement: Single door centered on the front facade, adjacent to the window
